ddt:Target.Name: RCU E95 slot V2
ddt:Target.Description:
Author: Minh Nam CHAU Service: DIESE/65620 Phone: 01 768 52 035
Last update: 07/05/09
Roof Control Unit RCU E95
Projet : E95 Slot V2 (New pump) OK

Data.Name: VIN Data
Data.Comment: V.I.N. in ASCII

Item.Text: Vehicle not locked from the outside

Data.Name: AllWindowLiftFunctionsEnable
Data.Comment: Display for sent CAN signal

Item.Text: Closed and locked and no valid open request
Closed and locked & close Roofbutton pressed or Open roof button pressed & the StartConditions are valid
TrkLid: unlock but not open, Roof: close
TrkLid: open, PSM down, Roof: close
TrkLid: open, PSM not down & not up, Roof close
TrkLid: open, PSM up, Roof: close
TrkLid: open, PSM up, Roof: not open & not close
TrkLid: open, PSM up, Roof: open
TrkLid not open & not lock, PSM up & Roof: open
TrkLid: lock, PSM up, Roof: open, open RoofButton pressed or close button pressed, StartConditions valid
Opened and locked and no valid open request

Data.Name: Button open roof
Data.Comment: Logic State: Micro Switch I-MS-RC-C

Data.Name: Button close roof
Data.Comment: Logic State: Micro Switch I-MS-RC-O

Data.Name: Button windows up
Data.Comment: Logic State: Micro Switch I-MS-AWC-U

Data.Name: Button windows down
Data.Comment: Logic State: Micro Switch I-MS-AWC-D

Data.Name: PowerStriker Support Up
Data.Comment: Logic State: Micro Switch I-MS-PSTR-U

Data.Name: Hall Roof Opened
Data.Comment: Logic State: Hall Sensor I-HS-R-O

Data.Name: PowerStriker Pulse
Data.Comment: Logic State: Output O-HS-PSP

Data.Name: Inv Polarity Relais
Data.Comment: Logic State: Output Inverse Polarity Protection Relay
Data.Description: The IPP relay supplies the pump motor, the parcel shelf motors and the power striker supply.

Data.Name: Hydraulic Position
Data.Comment: Position of Roof and Trunklid
Data.Description:
Hydraulic Position:

1: Roof closed, Trunklid closed

2: Roof closed,  Trunklid intermediate

3: Roof closed, Trunklid open

4: Roof intermediate, Trunklid open

5: Roof open, Trunklid open

6: Roof open, Trunklid intermediate

7: Roof open, Trunklid open

Data.Name: Status Ubat
Data.Comment: Failure: Supply voltage out of range

Data.Name: Status Vehicle locked
Data.Comment: Precondition: Logic State CAN Signal VehicleLockedOutsideState

Data.Name: Status Windows enable
Data.Comment: Precondition: Logic State CAN Signal AllWindowsLiftFunctionEnable

Data.Name: Status Engine
Data.Comment: Precondition: Logic State CAN Signal EngineStatus_R

Data.Name: Status Antiplay Hydraulic
Data.Comment: Failure: Status for Hydraulic Motor Antiplay Counter

Data.Name: Trunklid Latch Motor
Data.Comment: Logic State: Output O-HS-TLLM

Data.Name: Pos Shelf right up
Data.Comment: Calculated Cabrio End Position of Right Shelf Motor

Data.Name: Pos Shelf left up
Data.Comment: Calculated Cabrio End Position of Left Shelf Motor

Data.Name: Pos Shelf left down
Data.Comment: Calculated Coupe End Position of Left Shelf Motor

Data.Name: Pos Shelf right down
Data.Comment: Calculated Coupe End Position of Right Shelf Motor

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTol1_1
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTol1_2
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTol1_3
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Resqueeze Time Reach Trunklid Open Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTol1_4
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTol1_5
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Resqueeze Time Reach Roof Open Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTol1_6
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTol1_7
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Resqueeze Time Reach Trunklid Closed Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTol2_1
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTol2_2
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTol2_3
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTol2_4
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTol2_5
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTol2_6
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTol2_7
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTim_1
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Timeout Leave Trunklid Closed Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTim_2
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Timeout ReachTrunklid Open Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTim_3
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Timeout Leave Roof Closed Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTim_4
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Timeout Reach Roof Open Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTim_5
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Timeout Leave Trunklid Open Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTim_6
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Timeout ReachTrunklid Closed Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofOpenTim_7
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTim_1
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTim_2
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Timeout ReachTrunklid Closed Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTim_3
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Timeout Leave Trunklid Open Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTim_4
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Timeout Reach Roof Closed Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTim_5
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Timeout Leave Roof Open Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTim_6
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Timeout ReachTrunklid Open Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTim_7
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Timeout Leave Trunklid Closed Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTol1_1
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Resqueeze Time Reach Trunklid Closed Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTol1_2
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTol1_3
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Resqueeze Time Reach Roof Closed Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTol1_4
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTol1_5
Data.Comment: Parameter: Hydraulic Resqueeze Time Reach Trunklid Open Position

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTol1_6
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTol1_7
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTol2_1
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTol2_2
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTol2_3
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTol2_4
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTol2_5
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTol2_6
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamRoofCloseTol2_7
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unused

Data.Name: ParamShelfTimCabStart
Data.Comment: Parameter: Timeout for Leaving Shelf Coupe Position

Data.Name: ParamShelfTimCabEnd
Data.Comment: Parameter: Timeout for Reaching Shelf Cabrio Position

Data.Name: ParamShelfTimCouStart
Data.Comment: Parameter: Timeout for Leaving Shelf Cabrio Position

Data.Name: ParamShelfTimCouEnd
Data.Comment: Parameter: Timeout for Reaching Shelf Coupe Position

Data.Name: ParamShelfTolCab
Data.Comment: Parameter: Resqueeze Time after Reaching Shelf Cabrio Position

Data.Name: ParamShelfTolCou
Data.Comment: Parameter: Resqueeze Time after Reaching Shelf Coupe Position

Data.Name: ParamShelfDenormCab
Data.Comment: Parameter: Counter Limit for Denormized Shelf in Cabrio Position

Data.Name: ParamShelfDenormCou
Data.Comment: Parameter: Counter Limit for Denormized Shelf in Coupe Position

Data.Name: ParamShelfDenormMid
Data.Comment: Parameter: Counter Preset for Denormized Shelf in Start Position

Data.Name: ParamShelfNormCab
Data.Comment: Parameter: Counter Limit for Normized Shelf in Cabrio Position

Data.Name: ParamShelfNormCou
Data.Comment: Parameter: Counter Limit for Normized Shelf in Coupe Position

Data.Name: ParamShelfTolCabMax
Data.Comment: Parameter: Shelf Position Counter Tolerance for Cabrio Position

Data.Name: ParamShelfTolCabMin
Data.Comment: Parameter: Shelf Position Counter Tolerance for Cabrio Position

Data.Name: ParamShelfTolCouMin
Data.Comment: Parameter: Shelf Position Counter Tolerance for Coupe Position

Data.Name: ParamShelfTolCouMax
Data.Comment: Parameter: Shelf Position Counter Tolerance for Coupe Position

Data.Name: ParamLatchTol
Data.Comment: Parameter: Activation Time for Trunklid Latch Motor

Data.Name: ParamLatchTim
Data.Comment: Parameter: Timeout for Trunklid Latch Position Detection

Data.Name: ParamStrikerTim
Data.Comment: Parameter: Timeout for Power Striker Position Detection

Data.Name: ParamVoltTimFail
Data.Comment: Parameter: Minimum Time for Supply Voltage Out Of Range before Disabling Roof Movement

Data.Name: ParamPumpThermoFactor
Data.Comment: Parameter: Increment for Pump Motor Thermo Protection

Data.Name: ParamPumpThermoAllow
Data.Comment: Parameter: Reallow Threshold for Pump Motor Thermo Protection

Data.Name: ParamPumpThermoNoStart
Data.Comment: Parameter: Stop in End Position Threshold for Pump Motor Thermo Protection

Data.Name: ParamPumpThermoStop
Data.Comment: Parameter: Unconditional Stop Threshold for Pump Motor Thermo Protection

Data.Name: ParamValveStop
Data.Comment: Parameter: Maximum Time for Stop Mode

Data.Name: ParamValvePulseLen
Data.Comment: Parameter: Length of Refuge Mode

Data.Name: ParamValvePulseOn
Data.Comment: Parameter: Valve Pulse On- Time in Refuge Mode

Data.Name: ParamValvePulseOff
Data.Comment: Parameter: Valve Pulse Off- Time in Refuge Mode

Data.Name: ParamDispTimEndpos
Data.Comment: Parameter: Display time for 'End Of Conversion' message

Data.Name: ParamVehSpeedMax
Data.Comment: Parameter: Vehicle Speed for Stopping Roof Movement

Data.Name: ParamWindCmdTimeout
Data.Comment: Parameter: Maximum Accepted Activation Time for Window Command Buttons

Data.Name: ParamRoofCmdTimeout
Data.Comment: Parameter: Maximum Accepted Activation Time for Roof Command Buttons

Data.Name: ParamShelfPulseMax
Data.Comment: Parameter: Maximum Shelf Sensor Pulse Lenght before Stall Detection

Data.Name: ParamShelfDiff
Data.Comment: Parameter: Maximum Shelf Counter Difference before Resychronization

Data.Name: TraceabilityData.ProdWeek
Data.Comment: Supplier Identification for week of production

Data.Name: TraceabilityData.ProdYear
Data.Comment: Supplier Identification for year of production

Data.Name: TraceabilityData.ProdCode
Data.Comment: Supplier Identification for ECU type

Data.Name: TraceabilityData.ProdSerial
Data.Comment: Supplier Identification distinct for every produced ECU of type 'ProdCode'

Data.Name: Trunklid Latch Open
Data.Comment: Logic State: Micro Switch I-MS-TLL-O

Data.Name: TimeRoofOpen
Data.Comment: Timing Measurement for a Roof Opening Cycle

Data.Name: TimeRoofClose
Data.Comment: Timing Measurement for a Roof Closing Cycle

Data.Name: Status Vehicle Speed
Data.Comment: Precondition: Logic State CAN Signal VehicleSpeed

Data.Name: Status In Hall E
Data.Comment: Failure: Electrical Error at I-HS-PSML or I-HS-PSMR

Data.Name: Status In Hall P
Data.Comment: Failure: Electrical Error at Roof System Position Hall Sensors Inputs

Data.Name: Status Out Hall E
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to GND at O-HS-PSML or O-HS-PSMR

Data.Name: Status Out OpL Latch
Data.Comment: Failure: Open Load at O-HS-TLLM

Data.Name: Status Out ScB IPPR1
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to Ubat at O-HS-PSTR

Data.Name: Status Out ScB IPPR2
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to Ubat at O-TH-PSMR (?)

Data.Name: Status Out ScB Latch
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to Ubat at O-HS-TLLM

Data.Name: Status Out ScB Shelf L
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to Ubat at O-TH-PSML

Data.Name: Status Out ScB Shelf R
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to Ubat at O-TH-PSMR

Data.Name: Status Out ScB Striker
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to Ubat at O-HS-PSP

Data.Name: Status Out ScG IPPR1
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to GND at O-HS-PSTR

Data.Name: Status Out ScG IPPR2
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to GND at O-TH-PSMR

Data.Name: Status Out ScG Latch
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to GND at O-HS-TLLM

Data.Name: Status Out ScG Shelf L
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to GND at O-TH-PSML

Data.Name: Status Out ScG Shelf R
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to GND at O-TH-PSMR

Data.Name: Status Out ScG Striker
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to GND at O-HS-PSP

Data.Name: Status Pos Lug. Cover
Data.Comment: Precondition: Logic State Micro Switch I-MS-LC_U

Data.Name: Status Pos Roof System
Data.Comment: Failure: Hydraulic Position is unknown

Data.Name: Status Pos ROPS
Data.Comment: Precondition: Logic State CAN Signal ROPS_Position

Data.Name: Status Tim Latch
Data.Comment: Failure: Timeout during trunklid latch opening

Data.Name: Status Tim Shelf
Data.Comment: Failure: Timeout during parcel shelf movement

Data.Name: Status Tim Hydr
Data.Comment: Failure: Timeout during hydraulic roof system movement

Data.Name: Status Tim Striker
Data.Comment: Failure: Timeout during power striker movement

Data.Name: Status Antiplay Latch
Data.Comment: Failure: Status for Trunklid Latch Antiplay Counter

Data.Name: Status Antiplay Striker
Data.Comment: Failure: Status for Power Striker Antiplay Counter

Data.Name: Status Antiplay Shelf
Data.Comment: Failure: Status for Parcel Shelf Antiplay Counter

Data.Name: Status Out Cur Shelf L
Data.Comment: Failure: PSML Current Limitation

Data.Name: Status Out Cur Shelf R
Data.Comment: Failure: PSMR Current Limitation

Data.Name: Status Out OpL Shelf L
Data.Comment: Failure: Open Load at O-TH-PSML

Data.Name: Status Out OpL Shelf R
Data.Comment: Failure: Open Load at O-TH-PSMR

Data.Name: Status Counter Shelf L
Data.Comment: Failure: Status for Position Counter Left Parcel Shelf Motor

Data.Name: Status Counter Shelf R
Data.Comment: Failure: Status for Position Counter Right Parcel Shelf Motor

Data.Name: Status Out OpL Striker
Data.Comment: Failure: Open Load at O-HS-PSP

Data.Name: ParamInvRoofPosTim
Data.Comment: Parameter: Delay for Invalid Roof Position Detection

Data.Name: Hall Roof Latched Left
Data.Comment: Logic State: Hall Sensor I-HS-R-LL

Data.Name: Hall Roof Latched Right
Data.Comment: Logic State: Hall Sensor I-HS-R-RL

Data.Name: Hall Trunklid Opened
Data.Comment: Logic State: Hall Sensor I-HS-TL-O

Data.Name: Hall Trunklid Latched Right
Data.Comment: Logic State: Hall Sensor I-HS-TLMR-LO

Data.Name: Hall Trunklid Latched Left
Data.Comment: Logic State: Hall Sensor I-HS-TLML-LO

Data.Name: CurrentH1
Data.Comment: Current: Hall Sensor I-HS-R-O

Data.Name: CurrentH3
Data.Comment: Current: Hall Sensor I-HS-RRTL-C

Data.Name: CurrentH4
Data.Comment: Current: Hall Sensor I-HS-R-LL

Data.Name: CurrentH5
Data.Comment: Current: Hall Sensor I-HS-R-RL

Data.Name: CurrentH10
Data.Comment: Current: Hall Sensor I-HS-PSML

Data.Name: CurrentH6
Data.Comment: Current: Hall Sensor I-HS-PSMR

Data.Name: CurrentH7
Data.Comment: Current: Hall Sensor I-HS-TL-O

Data.Name: CurrentH8
Data.Comment: Current: Hall Sensor I-HS-TLML-LO

Data.Name: CurrentH9
Data.Comment: Current: Hall Sensor I-HS-TLMR-LO

Data.Name: RoofCycleCount
Data.Comment: Roof Cycle Counter is increased for every complete opening or closing cycle

Item.Text: ResetAllTeach procedure not activated or finished

Data.Name: CurrentHA
Data.Comment: Current: Hall Sensor Spare A

Data.Name: CurrentHB
Data.Comment: Current: Hall Sensor Spare B

Data.Name: CurrentHC
Data.Comment: Current: Hall Sensor Spare C

Data.Name: ParamLatchRunMax
Data.Comment: Parameter: Antiplay Threshold for Trunklid Latch

Data.Name: ParamStrikerRunMax
Data.Comment: Parameter: Antiplay Threshold for Power Striker

Data.Name: ParamShelfRunMax
Data.Comment: Parameter: Antiplay Threshold for Shelf System

Data.Name: Counter Striker
Data.Comment: Antiplay Counter for Power Striker

Data.Name: Counter Latch
Data.Comment: Antiplay Counter for Trunklid Latch

Data.Name: Counter Shelf
Data.Comment: Antiplay Counter for Shelf

Data.Name: Luggage Cover
Data.Comment: Logic State: Micro Switch I-MS-LC_U

Data.Name: Counter Valves
Data.Comment: Antiplay Counter for Magnetic Valves in Stop Mode

Data.Name: ParamThermoCntEnable
Data.Comment: Parameter: Global Antiplay and Thermoprotection Enabled

Data.Name: ParamInvLugCov
Data.Comment: Parameter: Inverse Logic for MS-LC-U

Data.Name: ParamInvRoofOpen
Data.Comment: Parameter: Inverse Logic for HS-R-O

Data.Name: ParamInvRoofClosed
Data.Comment: Parameter: Inverse Logic for HS-RRTL-C

Data.Name: ParamInvRoofLatchedLeft
Data.Comment: Parameter: Inverse Logic for HS-R-LL

Item.Text: hall active / roof not latched left

Data.Name: ParamInvRoofLatchedRight
Data.Comment: Parameter: Inverse Logic for HS-R-RL

Item.Text: hall active / roof not latched right

Data.Name: ParamVehSpeedDTC
Data.Comment: Parameter: Vehicle Speed for Setting an Overspeed DTC

Item.Text: Only fault reports during cranking are enabled
All fault reports not related to APC are enabled
All fault reports and alerts are enabled

Data.Name: ParamLatchRunFactor
Data.Comment: Parameter: Antiplay Increment for Trunklid Latch

Data.Name: ParamStrikerRunFactor
Data.Comment: Parameter: Antiplay Increment for Power Striker

Data.Name: ParamShelfRunFactor
Data.Comment: Parameter: Antiplay Increment for Shelf System

Data.Name: ParamShelfCurrMaxL
Data.Comment: Parameter: Maximum Current for O-TH-PSML

Data.Name: ParamShelfCurrMaxR
Data.Comment: Parameter: Maximum Current for O-TH-PSMR

Data.Name: Hall Roof Ready To Latch
Data.Comment: Logic State: Hall Sensor I-HS-RRTL-C

Data.Name: Counter PSML
Data.Comment: Position Counter for Left Shelf Motor

Data.Name: Counter PSMR
Data.Comment: Position Counter for Right Shelf Motor

Data.Name: Counter Pump
Data.Comment: Antiplay Counter for Pump Motor

Data.Name: SnapCounter PSML
Data.Comment: Position Counter for Left Shelf Motor

Data.Name: SnapCounter PSMR
Data.Comment: Position Counter for Left Shelf Motor

Data.Name: SnapSpeed
Data.Comment: Position Counter for Left Shelf Motor

Data.Name: ParamVoltHiRec
Data.Comment: Parameter: Maximum Supply Voltage before Reenabling Roof Movement

Data.Name: ParamVoltHiFail
Data.Comment: Parameter: Maximum Supply Voltage before Disabling Roof Movement

Data.Name: ParamVoltLoIntRec
Data.Comment: Parameter: Minimum Supply Voltage before Reenabling Roof Movement in Intermediate Position

Data.Name: ParamVoltLoEndRec
Data.Comment: Parameter: Minimum Supply Voltage before Reenabling Roof Movement in End Position

Data.Name: ParamVoltTimRec
Data.Comment: Parameter: Minimum Time for Supply Voltage In Range before Reenabling Roof Movement

Data.Name: ParamVoltLoIntFail
Data.Comment: Parameter: Minimum Supply Voltage before Disabling Roof Movement in Intermediate Position

Data.Name: ParamVoltLoEndFail
Data.Comment: Parameter: Minimum Supply Voltage before Disabling Roof Movement in End Position

Data.Name: ParamVoltLoAbsFail
Data.Comment: Parameter: Minimum Supply Voltage before Setting an Undervoltage DTC

Data.Name: ParamStrikerTol_A
Data.Comment: Parameter: Activation Time for Power Striker Trigger for 0 < Volt < VoltLo

Data.Name: ParamStrikerTol_B
Data.Comment: Parameter: Activation Time for Power Striker Trigger for VoltLo < Volt < VoltMid

Data.Name: ParamStrikerTol_C
Data.Comment: Parameter: Activation Time for Power Striker Trigger for VoltMid < Volt < VoltHi

Data.Name: ParamStrikerTol_D
Data.Comment: Parameter: Activation Time for Power Striker Trigger for VoltHi < Volt

Data.Name: ParamStrikerVoltLo
Data.Comment: Parameter: Lower Voltage Level for Power Striker Trigger

Data.Name: ParamStrikerVoltMid
Data.Comment: Parameter: Medium Voltage Level for Power Striker Trigger

Data.Name: ParamStrikerVoltHi
Data.Comment: Parameter: Upper Voltage Level for Power Striker Trigger

Data.Name: Status Out OpL Pump 1
Data.Comment: Failure: Open Load at O-HS-PM1

Data.Name: Status Out ScB Pump 1
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to Ubat at O-HS-PM1

Data.Name: Status Out ScG Pump 1
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to GND at O-HS-PM1

Data.Name: Status Out OpL Pump 2
Data.Comment: Failure: Open Load at O-HS-PM2

Data.Name: Status Out OpL Valve 1
Data.Comment: Failure: Open Load at O-HS-V1

Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to Ubat at O-HS-PM2

Data.Name: Status Out ScB Valve 1
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to Ubat at O-HS-V1

Data.Name: Status Out ScG Valve 1
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to GND at O-HS-V1

Data.Name: Status Out ScG Pump 2
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to GND at O-HS-PM2

Data.Name: Hydraulic Valve 1
Data.Comment: Logic State: Output O-HS-V1

Data.Name: Hydraulic Pump 1
Data.Comment: Logic State: Output O-HS-PM1

Data.Name: Hydraulic Pump 2
Data.Comment: Logic State: Output O-HS-PM2

Data.Comment: Precondition: Logic State CAN Signal VehicleLockedOutsideState

Data.Comment: Precondition: Logic State CAN Signal VehicleSpeed

Data.Comment: Precondition: Logic State CAN Signal ROPS_Position

Data.Comment: Precondition: Logic State CAN Signal EngineStatus_R

Data.Comment: Precondition: Logic State CAN Signal ROPS_Position

Data.Name: Status X Windows enable
Data.Comment: Precondition: Logic State CAN Signal AllWindowsLiftFunctionEnable

Data.Name: Status X Counter Shelf L
Data.Comment: Failure: Status for Position Counter Left Parcel Shelf Motor

Data.Name: Status X Counter Shelf R
Data.Comment: Failure: Status for Position Counter Left Parcel Shelf Motor

Data.Comment: Failure: Electrical Error at I-HS-PSML or I-HS-PSMR

Data.Name: Status X In Hall P
Data.Comment: Failure: Electrical Error at I-HS-PSML or I-HS-PSMR

Data.Name: Status X Out Hall E
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to GND at O-HS-PSML or O-HS-PSMR

Data.Comment: Failure: Open Load at O-HS-TLLM

Data.Name: Status X Tim Striker
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to GND at O-TH-PSMR

Data.Name: Status X Tim Shelf
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to GND at O-TH-PSMR

Data.Name: Status X Tim Latch
Data.Comment: Failure: Short Circuit to GND at O-TH-PSMR

Data.Name: Parcelshelf left plus output
Data.Comment: Logic State: Output O-TH-PSML/+

Data.Name: Parcelshelf left gnd output
Data.Comment: Logic State: Output O-TH-PSML/-

Data.Name: Parcelshelf right plus output
Data.Comment: Logic State: Output O-TH-PSMR/+

Data.Name: Parcelshelf right gnd output
Data.Comment: Logic State: Output O-TH-PSMR/-

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or syst operation obstructed or blocked
Implausible cabrio position at left parcel shelf motor
Implausible coupe position at left parcel shelf motor
Implausible cabrio position at right parcel shelf motor
Implausible coupe position at right parcel shelf motor
Antiplay of trunklid latch motor active
Antiplay of power striker motor active
Antiplay of parcel shelf left motors active
Antiplay of parcel shelf right motors active
Windows Up and Windows Down simultaneously active
Roof Open and Roof Close simultaneously active
TimeOut on Hall-Switch H3_Roof ready to latch
TimeOut on Hall-Switch H2_Roof latched left
TimeOut on Hall-Switch H4_Roof latched right
Timeout at micro switch Trunklid latch
TimeOut on Hall-Switch H8_Trunklid mech. latched left
TimeOut on Hall-Switch H9_Trunklid mech. latched right
Stop-Mode for hydraulic valve terminated (Refuge mode)
Timeout for magnetic valves stop mode

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Comment: Antiplay of power striker motor active

Data.Name: ABB11C
Data.Comment: Supply voltage out of range

Data.Name: ABB042

Data.Name: AB9088
Data.Comment: CAN - Bus OFF
